base.$description: Core brand color for logos, accent borders, and brand markers.

subtle.$description: Low-emphasis brand wash for large background areas.

contrast.$description: Foreground color intended to contrast against primary.base.

base.$description: Primary neutral color for non-brand emphasis and neutral UI states.

subtle.$description: Low-emphasis neutral wash for non-brand UI states.

contrast.$description: Foreground color intended to contrast against neutral.base.

base.$description: Primary destructive or error color for critical actions and status indicators.

subtle.$description: Low-emphasis danger wash for destructive or error contexts.

contrast.$description: Foreground color intended to contrast against danger.base.

base.$description: Primary success color for positive actions and status indicators.

subtle.$description: Low-emphasis success wash for positive status contexts.

contrast.$description: Foreground color intended to contrast against success.base.

base.$description: Primary warning color for cautionary actions and status indicators.

subtle.$description: Low-emphasis warning wash for cautionary status contexts.

contrast.$description: Foreground color intended to contrast against warning.base.

page.$description: Page canvas background for the app or document root.

default.$description: Default container background for cards, panels, and content surfaces.

raised.$description: Raised surface background for popovers, menus, and sticky regions.

sunken.$description: Inset surface background for wells, code blocks, and input-like areas.

disabled.$description: Background color for disabled surfaces and inactive controls.

overlay.$description: Overlay backdrop color used behind modals, drawers, and scrims.

bold.$description: High-emphasis surface color for app chrome and prominent containers.

default.$description: Default text color for primary content.

secondary.$description: Secondary text color for supporting content.

tertiary.$description: Tertiary text color for metadata and low-emphasis content.

placeholder.$description: Text color for placeholder content in form controls.

disabled.$description: Text color for disabled content and inactive controls.

inverse.$description: Text color for content placed on inverse surfaces.

link.$description: Text color for links and inline navigation.

primary.$description: Text color for content placed on primary interactive fills.

bold.$description: Text color for content placed on bold surfaces.

default.$description: Default border color for controls, containers, and dividers.

strong.$description: Stronger border color for emphasized boundaries.

subtle.$description: Subtle border color for low-emphasis dividers and boundaries.

active.$description: Border color for active controls and current selections.

danger.$description: Border color for destructive or error states.

focus.$description: Border color used with keyboard focus indicators.

selected.$description: Border color for selected items and surfaces.

bold.$description: Border color for bold surfaces and high-contrast chrome.

default.$description: Primary interactive fill in the resting state.

active.$description: Primary interactive fill during press or active state.

disabled.$description: Primary interactive fill for disabled controls.

default.$description: Low-emphasis interactive background in the resting state.

active.$description: Low-emphasis interactive background during press or active state.

disabled.$description: Low-emphasis interactive background for disabled controls.

selected.$description: Low-emphasis interactive background for selected controls and navigation items.

default.$description: High-contrast interactive background in the resting state.

active.$description: High-contrast interactive background during press or active state.

disabled.$description: High-contrast interactive background for disabled controls.

selected.$description: High-contrast interactive background for selected controls and navigation items.

default.$description: Destructive interactive fill in the resting state.

active.$description: Destructive interactive fill during press or active state.

disabled.$description: Destructive interactive fill for disabled controls.

default.$description: Success interactive fill in the resting state.

active.$description: Success interactive fill during press or active state.

disabled.$description: Success interactive fill for disabled controls.

text.$description: Text color for destructive or error feedback messages.

background.$description: Background color for destructive or error feedback messages.

text.$description: Text color for success feedback messages.

background.$description: Background color for success feedback messages.

text.$description: Text color for warning feedback messages.

background.$description: Background color for warning feedback messages.

text.$description: Text color for neutral feedback messages.

background.$description: Background color for neutral feedback messages.
